verses.geez:
ወፈነወ ፡ ኢየሱስ ፡ እምነ ፡ ሳጢን ፡ ክልኤተ ፡ ወራዙተ ፡ ሰብአ ፡ ዐይን ፡ ጽምሚተ ፡ ወይቤሎሙ ፡ ዕረጉ ፡ ወርእይዋ
                  ፡ ለይእቲ ፡ ምድር ፡ ወለኢያሪኮሂ ፡ ወሖሩ ፡ እልክቱ ፡ ክልኤቱ ፡ ወራዙት ፡ ወቦኡ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ኢያሪኮ ፡ ወቦኡ ፡ ውስተ ፡
                  ቤተ ፡ አሐቲ ፡ ብእሲት ፡ ዘማ ፡ እንተ ፡ ስማ ፡ ራአብ ፡ ወኀደሩ ፡ ህየ ።

translations.lxx: And Joshua the son of Naue sent out of Sattin two young men to spy the land, saying, Go up and view the land and Jericho: and the two young men went and entered into Jericho; and they entered into the house of a harlot, whose name was Raab, and lodged there.
translations.kjv: And Joshua the son of Nun sent out of Shittim two men to spy secretly, saying, Go view the land, even Jericho. And they went, and came into an harlot’s house, named Rahab, and lodged there.

verses.geez:
ወአይድዕዎ ፡ ለንጉሠ ፡ ኢያሪኮ ፡ ወይቤልዎ ፡ ናሁ ፡ ቦኡ ፡ ዝየ ፡ ዕደው ፡ በሌሊት ፡ እምነ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ እስራኤል ፡
                  ሰብአ ፡ ዐይን ፡ ከመ ፡ ይርአዩ ፡ ብሔረ ።

translations.lxx: And it was reported to the king of Jericho, saying, Men of the sons of Israel have come in hither to spy the land.
translations.kjv: And it was told the king of Jericho, saying, Behold, there came men in hither to night of the children of Israel to search out the country.

verses.geez:
ወለአከ ፡ ንጉሠ ፡ ኢያሪኮ ፡ ኀበ ፡ ራአብ ፡ ወይቤ ፡ በልዋ ፡ ለራአብ ፡ አውፅኢአ ፡ ዕደወአ ፡ እለአ ፡ ቦኡአ ፡
                  ኀቤኪአ ፡ በሌሊትአ ፡ ወቦኡአ ፡ ቤተኪአ ፡ ሰብአ ፡ ዐይንአ ፡ እሙንቱአ ፡ ወከመአ ፡ ይርአዩአ ፡ ብሔረአ ፡ መጽኡአ ።

translations.lxx: And the king of Jericho sent and spoke to Raab, saying, Bring out the men that entered into thine house this night; for they are come to spy out the land.
translations.kjv: And the king of Jericho sent unto Rahab, saying, Bring forth the men that are come to thee, which are entered into thine house: for they be come to search out all the country.

verses.geez:
ወነሥአቶሙ ፡ ይእቲ ፡ ብእሲት ፡ ለእልክቱ ፡ ዕደው ፡ ክልኤቱ ፡ ወኀብአቶሙ ፡ ወትቤ ፡ ዕደውሰ ፡ ቦኡ ፡ ኀቤየ ፡
                  ወኢያእመርኩ ፡ እምአይቴ ፡ እሙንቱ ።

translations.lxx: And the woman took the two men and hid them; and she spoke to the messengers, saying, The men came in to me,
translations.kjv: And the woman took the two men, and hid them, and said thus, There came men unto me, but I wist not whence they were:

verses.geez:
ወእንዘ ፡ ዕጽው ፡ ኆኅት ፡ በጽልመት ፡ ወፅኡ ፡ ውእቶሙ ፡ ዕደው ፡ ወኢያእመርኩ ፡ እንከ ፡ አይቴ ፡ ሖሩ ፡ ውእቶሙ ፡
                  ዕደው ፡ ወሑሩ ፡ ፍጡነ ፡ ወትልውዎሙ ፡ ወዴግንዎሙ ፡ ዮጊ ፡ ትረክብዎሙ ።

translations.lxx: but when the gate was shut in the evening, the men went out; I know not whither they are gone: follow after them, if ye may overtake them.
translations.kjv: And it came to pass about the time of shutting of the gate, when it was dark, that the men went out: whither the men went I wot not: pursue after them quickly; for ye shall overtake them.

verses.geez: ወይእቲሰ ፡ አዕረገቶሙ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ናሕስ ፡ ወኀብአቶሙ ፡ ማእከለ ፡ ዕፀው ፡ ውስተ ፡ ሕለት ፡ ዘውጡሕ ።

translations.lxx: But she had brought them up upon the house, and hid them in the flax-stalks that were spread by her on the house.
translations.kjv: But she had brought them up to the roof of the house, and hid them with the stalks of flax, which she had laid in order upon the roof.

verses.geez: ወዴገንዎሙ ፡ ውእቶሙ ፡ [ዕደው ፡] እንበለ ፡ ይቢቱ ፡ ወይእቲሰ ፡ ዐርገት ፡ ኀቤሆሙ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ናሕስ ።

translations.lxx: And it came to pass when the men who pursued after them were gone forth, and before the spies had lain down to sleep, that she came up to them on the top of the house;
translations.kjv: And before they were laid down, she came up unto them upon the roof;

verses.geez:
ወትቤሎሙ ፡ አአምር ፡ ከመ ፡ አግብኦ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ለብሔር ፡ ለክሙ ፡ እስመ ፡ አምጽአ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ፍርሀተክሙ
                  ፡ ላዕሌነ ፡ ወተመስዉ ፡ ኵሎሙ ፡ እለ ፡ ይነብሩ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ብሔር ፡ እምነ ፡ ገጽክሙ ።

translations.lxx: and she said to them, I know that the Lord has given you the land; for the fear of you has fallen upon us.
translations.kjv: And she said unto the men, I know that the LORD hath given you the land, and that your terror is fallen upon us, and that all the inhabitants of the land faint because of you.

verses.geez:
እስመ ፡ ሰማዕነ ፡ ከመ ፡ አይበሳ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ለባሕረ ፡ [ኤ]ርትራ ፡ እምቅድመ ፡ ገጽክሙ ፡ አመ ፡ ወፃእክሙ ፡
                  እምነ ፡ ምድረ ፡ ግብጽ ፡ ወኵሎ ፡ ዘገብረ ፡ ላዕለ ፡ ነገሥተ ፡ አሞሬዎን ፡ እለ ፡ ሀለዉ ፡ ማዕዶተ ፡ ዮርዳንስ ፡ ለሴዎን
                  ፡ ወለአግ ፡ እለ ፡ ሠሮክምዎሙ ።

translations.lxx: For we have heard that the Lord God dried up the Red Sea before you, when ye came out of the land of Egypt, and all that he did to the two kings of the Amorites, who were beyond Jordan, to Seon and Og, whom ye utterly destroyed.
translations.kjv: For we have heard how the LORD dried up the water of the Red sea for you, when ye came out of Egypt; and what ye did unto the two kings of the Amorites, that were on the other side Jordan, Sihon and Og, whom ye utterly destroyed.

verses.geez:
ወሶበ ፡ ሰማዕነ ፡ ንሕነ ፡ ደንገፀነ ፡ ልብነ ፡ ወኢተርፈት ፡ ነፍሰ ፡ አሐዱ ፡ እምኔነ ፡ እምነ ፡ ቅድመ ፡ ገጽክሙ ፡
                  እስመ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ አምላክክሙ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ አምላክ ፡ በሰማይ ፡ በላዕሉ ፡ ወበምድር ፡ በታሕቱ ።

translations.lxx: And when we heard it we were amazed in our heart, and there was no longer any spirit in any of us because of you, for the Lord your God is God in heaven above, and on the earth beneath.
translations.kjv: And as soon as we had heard these things, our hearts did melt, neither did there remain any more courage in any man, because of you: for the LORD your God, he is God in heaven above, and in earth beneath.

verses.geez:
ወይእዜኒ ፡ መሐሉ ፡ ሊተ ፡ በእግዚአብሔር ፡ በከመ ፡ ገበርኩ ፡ ምስሌክሙ ፡ ምሕረተ ፡ ከመ ፡ ትግበሩ ፡ ምስሌየ ፡
                  ምሕረተ ፡ ወምስለ ፡ ቤተ ፡ አቡየ ፡ ወትሁቡኒ ፡ ተአምረ ፡ በጽድቅ ።

translations.lxx: And now swear to me by the Lord God; since I deal mercifully with you, so do ye also deal mercifully with the house of my father:
translations.kjv: Now therefore, I pray you, swear unto me by the LORD, since I have shewed you kindness, that ye will also shew kindness unto my father’s house, and give me a true token:

verses.geez:
ወአሕይዉ ፡ ቤተ ፡ አቡየ ፡ ወእምየኒ ፡ ወአኀዊየኒ ፡ ወኵሎ ፡ ቤትየ ፡ ወኵሎ ፡ ዘዚአሆሙ ፡ ወአድኅኑ ፡ ነፍሰነ ፡
                  እምነ ፡ ሞት ።

translations.lxx: and save alive the house of my father, my mother, and my brethren, and all my house, and all that they have, and ye shall rescue my soul from death.
translations.kjv: And that ye will save alive my father, and my mother, and my brethren, and my sisters, and all that they have, and deliver our lives from death.

verses.geez:
ወይቤልዋ ፡ እሙንቱ ፡ ዕደው ፡ ነፍስነ ፡ ህየንቴክሙ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ሞት ፡ ወትቤሎሙ ፡ ይእቲ ፡ አመ ፡ አግብአ ፡
                  እግዚአብሔር ፡ ለሀገርነ ፡ ውስተ ፡ እደዊክሙ ፡ ግበሩ ፡ ምሕረተ ፡ ምስሌየ ፡ ወጽድቀ ፡ ወይቤልዋ ፡ እሙንቱ ፡ ዕደው ፡
                  ለእመ ፡ ኢያይዳዕክሙ ፡ በእንቲአነ ፡ ንገብር ፡ ምሕረተ ፡ ምስሌኪ ፡ አመ ፡ አግብአ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ለሀገርክሙ ፡ ለነ ፡
                  ወጽድቀ ።

translations.lxx: And the men said to her, Our life for yours even to death: and she said, When the Lord shall have delivered the city to you, ye shall deal mercifully and truly with me.
translations.kjv: And the men answered her, Our life for yours, if ye utter not this our business. And it shall be, when the LORD hath given us the land, that we will deal kindly and truly with thee.

verses.geez:
ወአውረደቶሙ ፡ በሐብል ፡ እንተ ፡ መስኮት ፡ እስመ ፡ ቤታ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ጥቅም ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ወነበረት ፡ ይእቲ ፡ ውስተ ፡
                  አረፍቱ ።

translations.lxx: And she let them down by the window;
translations.kjv: Then she let them down by a cord through the window: for her house was upon the town wall, and she dwelt upon the wall.

verses.geez:
ወትቤሎሙ ፡ እንተ ፡ አድባር ፡ ሑሩ ፡ ከመ ፡ ኢይርከቡክሙ ፡ እለ ፡ ይዴግኑክሙ ፡ ወተኀብኡ ፡ ህየ ፡ ሠሉሰ ፡ መዋዕለ
                  ፡ እስከ ፡ ይገብኡ ፡ እለ ፡ ይዴግኑክሙ ፡ ወእምዝ ፡ ትገብኡ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ፍኖትክሙ ።

translations.lxx: and she said to them, Depart into the hill-country, lest the pursuers meet you, and ye shall be hidden there three days until your pursuers return from after you, and afterwards ye shall depart on your way.
translations.kjv: And she said unto them, Get you to the mountain, lest the pursuers meet you; and hide yourselves there three days, until the pursuers be returned: and afterward may ye go your way.

verses.geez: ወይቤልዋ ፡ እሙንቱ ፡ ዕደው ፡ ንጹሓን ፡ ንሕነ ፡ እምነ ፡ መሐላኪ ፡ ዘአምሐልክነ ።

translations.lxx: And the men said to her, We are clear of this thy oath.
translations.kjv: And the men said unto her, We will be blameless of this thine oath which thou hast made us swear.

verses.geez:
ናሁ ፡ ንሕነ ፡ ንበውእ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ጽንፈ ፡ ሀገር ፡ ወደዪ ፡ ዘንተ ፡ ፈትለ ፡ ቀይሐ ፡ ዘለይ ፡ ውስተ ፡ መስኮት ፡
                  እንተ ፡ እምኔሃ ፡ አውረድክነ ፡ ወአ[ባ]ኪኒ ፡ ወእ[መ]ኪኒ ፡ ወአኀዊኪኒ ፡ አስተጋብኢ ፡ ኀቤኪ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ቤትኪ ።

translations.lxx: Behold, we shall enter into a part of the city, and thou shalt set a sign; thou shalt bind this scarlet cord in the window, by which thou hast let us down, and thou shalt bring in to thyself, into thy house, thy father, and thy mother, and thy brethren, and all the family of thy father.
translations.kjv: Behold, when we come into the land, thou shalt bind this line of scarlet thread in the window which thou didst let us down by: and thou shalt bring thy father, and thy mother, and thy brethren, and all thy father’s household, home unto thee.

verses.geez:
ወኵሉ ፡ ዘወፅአ ፡ አፍአ ፡ እምነ ፡ ኆኅተ ፡ ቤትኪ ፡ ይመውት ፡ ወንሕነሰ ፡ ንጹሓን ፡ ንሕነ ፡ እምነ ፡ ዝንቱ ፡
                  መሐላ ፡ ዘአምሐልክነ ፡ ወኵሉ ፡ ባሕቱ ፡ ዘሀለወ ፡ ምስሌኪ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ቤትኪ ፡ ላዕሌነ ፡ ኀጢአቱ ፡ ለእመ ፡ ሞተ ።

translations.lxx: And it shall come to pass that whosoever shall go outside the door of thy house, his guilt shall be upon him, and we shall be quit of this thine oath; and we will be responsible for all that shall be found with thee in thy house.
translations.kjv: And it shall be, that whosoever shall go out of the doors of thy house into the street, his blood shall be upon his head, and we will be guiltless: and whosoever shall be with thee in the house, his blood shall be on our head, if any hand be upon him.

verses.geez: ወለእመሰ ፡ ቦ ፡ ዘገፍዐነ ፡ ወከሠተ ፡ ነገረነ ፡ ንጹሓን ፡ ንሕነ ፡ እምነ ፡ ዝንቱ ፡ መሐላኪ ።

translations.lxx: But if any one should injure us, or betray these our matters, we shall be quit of this thine oath.
translations.kjv: And if thou utter this our business, then we will be quit of thine oath which thou hast made us to swear.

verses.geez:
ወትቤሎሙ ፡ ይኩን ፡ በከመ ፡ ትቤሉ ፡ ወፈነወቶሙ ፡ ወሖሩ ፡ ወአሰረት ፡ ዝክተ ፡ ተአምረ ፡ ዘለይ ፡ ውስተ ፡ መስኮታ
                  ።

translations.lxx: And she said to them, Let it be according to your word; and she sent them out, and they departed.
translations.kjv: And she said, According unto your words, so be it. And she sent them away, and they departed: and she bound the scarlet line in the window.

verses.geez:
ወወፅኡ ፡ ወሖሩ ፡ ውስተ ፡ አድባር ፡ ወነበሩ ፡ ህየ ፡ ሠሉሰ ፡ መዋዕለ ፡ እስከ ፡ ገብኡ ፡ እለ ፡ ዴገንዎሙ ፡
                  ወኀሠሥዎሙ ፡ እለ ፡ ዴገንዎሙ ፡ ወኢረከብዎሙ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ፍናዌ ።

translations.lxx: And they came to the hill-country, and remained there three days; and the pursuers searched all the roads, and found them not.
translations.kjv: And they went, and came unto the mountain, and abode there three days, until the pursuers were returned: and the pursuers sought them throughout all the way, but found them not.

verses.geez:
ወገብኡ ፡ እልክቱ ፡ ዕደው ፡ ወወረዱ ፡ እምነ ፡ ደብር ፡ ወኀለፉ ፡ ወበጽሑ ፡ ኀበ ፡ ኢየሱስ ፡ ወልደ ፡ ነዌ ፡
                  ወዜነውዎ ፡ ኵሎ ፡ ዘከመ ፡ ገብሩ ።

translations.lxx: And the two young men returned, and came down out of the mountain; and they went over to Joshua the son of Naue, and told him all things that had happened to them.
translations.kjv: So the two men returned, and descended from the mountain, and passed over, and came to Joshua the son of Nun, and told him all things that befell them:

verses.geez:
ወይቤልዎ ፡ ለኢየሱስ ፡ አግብአ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ኵሎ ፡ ምድረ ፡ ውስተ ፡ እዴነ ፡ ወደንገፁ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ አሕዛብ ፡ እለ
                  ፡ ይነብሩ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ይእቲ ፡ ምድር ፡ እምኔነ ።

translations.lxx: And they said to Joshua, The Lord has delivered all the land into our power, and all the inhabitants of that land tremble because of us.
translations.kjv: And they said unto Joshua, Truly the LORD hath delivered into our hands all the land; for even all the inhabitants of the country do faint because of us.
